title: salix × iterata
intro: Salix × iterata, a hybrid willow plant, is a cross between the Black Willow (Salix nigra) and the Sandbar Willow (Salix exigua) or possibly the Salix alba. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix × iterata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations. Salix × iterata can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
